task_description: End-to-end validation tests, documentation polish, and project completion for the Sleep Audio Pipeline CDK project (Issue #12). Following TDD, create comprehensive validation tests covering the full pipeline flow, polish all documentation, and bring the project to a clean completion state.

verification.summary: All 129 C# tests pass (70 CdkBaseStackTest + 56 EndToEndValidationTest + 3 PipelineStackTest), all 19 Python Lambda unit tests pass, CDK synth succeeds for default/dev/prod environments
